blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,532 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
